title: U.S.-China AI feud sees ASML walk tightrope between sales and geopolitics
summary: ASML is set to make around a fifth of its 2026 revenue from China, but geopolitical headwinds present a delicate situation.

title: SpaceX falls further in premarket after Starship test flight aborted
summary: SpaceX's stock plunged further on Friday, a day after it aborted a test flight for its Starship rocket at the last second.

title: Chinese startup Moonshot AI unveils Kimi model it says rivals OpenAI, Anthropic
summary: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

title: Xi pitches China as AI partner to developing world, warns against risks and security overreach
summary: China will provide developing countries with 5,000 opportunities in AI training and seminar programs, as well as develop AI cooperation with various blocs.

title: SoftBank sinks over 9% as Asia chip stocks track Wall Street AI sell-off
summary: The declines followed another weak session for U.S. technology stocks, with the Nasdaq Composite falling 1.47% as semiconductor shares came under renewed pressure.
